bosses.name: The Puppet Master
phases: summons life-draining puppets; hides ('Find me if you can'); FAKE-DEATH / 'pretender' phase — appears dead then revives ('plot twist')
attacks: DOCUMENTED-from-taunts+context: SUMMON-heavy — raises PUPPETS/minions that DRAIN the player's life ('Watch them dance, hero, as they drain your life away!'); a HIDE/seek mechanic ('Find me if you can hero, or die trying'); and a FAKE-DEATH revive (the master 'dies' then comes back — 'I am only a pretender! I am ready for a plot twist!'). Reconstruct as: Spawn life-drain puppets + an Invulnerable/Invisible hide phase + a death-fakeout revive (HpLessTransition to a 'fake death' state that revives).
taunts: Watch them dance, hero, as they drain your life away!
Find me if you can hero, or die trying
You may have killed me, but I am only a pretender! I am ready for a plot twist!
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (red 'The Puppet Master:' prefix confirmed, lines verbatim + repeated). *** COMPLETES the Puppet Master candidate ***: earlier (disc_hGSSP2J3gcQ) only the MINIONS' line 'We freed the master!' was captured; THIS gives the master's OWN 3 taunts + its mechanics (life-drain puppets + hide + FAKE-DEATH/plot-twist revive). Strong NEW custom build candidate now. Verify before building.
